---
pagetitle: "Contact"
toc: false
email-obfuscation: javascript
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Contact</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
```

## Visit Us

The ICC Lab is located in **G-building Room #301** at VinUniversity.

> **Street Address:** Vinhomes Ocean Park, Gia Lam, Ha Noi 12426, Vietnam
>


```{=html}
<iframe src="https://www.google.com/maps/place/VinUniversity/@20.9867425,105.9447031,15z/data=!4m6!3m5!1s0x3135afe809f342c5:0x136290b61ba411db!8m2!3d20.9883667!4d105.9444841!16s%2Fg%2F11j1fhjv0g?entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI2MDMyMy4xIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D" width="100%" height="450" style="border:0;" allowfullscreen="" loading="lazy" referrerpolicy="no-referrer-when-downgrade"></iframe>
```

## Email Us

```{=html}
<iframe src="https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd7LcnxZe53WZq_1QNRVZHFt1rni5dv67GmCiTseZxY4usddg/viewform?embedded=true" width="640" height="857" frameborder="0" marginheight="0" marginwidth="0">Loading…</iframe>
```
